You are working in /Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/recommendations-service (NestJS/TypeScript monorepo).

## Your Task
Fix ESLint `custom-rules/require-object-params` violations for Jira ticket RECO-690.
Ticket URL: https://customink.atlassian.net/browse/RECO-690

## Context
- Current branch: `RECO-689-fix-util-require-object-params`
- You must create a NEW branch from this branch (NOT from main)
- Branch name format: `RECO-690-<kebab-summary>`
- Commit format: `RECO-690: <imperative description>`

## ESLint Rule
`custom-rules/require-object-params` — all exported functions must use a single object destructuring parameter instead of positional params.

**Pattern:**
```typescript
// ❌ Before
export function myFn(id: string, name: string): void {}
// ✅ After
export function myFn({ id, name }: { id: string; name: string }): void {}
```

## Steps

### 1. Find the target file
Run ESLint to find remaining files with violations:
```bash
npx eslint --max-warnings=0 src/ --format=compact 2>&1 | grep "require-object-params" | head -30
```
Pick an appropriate unfixed file for RECO-690.

### 2. Create branch
```bash
git checkout -b RECO-690-<descriptive-name>
```
Branch from current branch `RECO-689-fix-util-require-object-params`.

### 3. Fix violations in target file(s)
- Change positional params to `{ param }: { param: type }` destructuring
- Update ALL internal calls to changed functions
- Find ALL callers: use Grep tool to search for function names across src/ and test/
- Update every call site
- Do NOT use `{ ...param }` spread shortcuts

### 4. Update tests
Find and update all test files that call changed functions.

### 5. Run tests
```bash
npm run test:unit -- --testPathPatterns="<pattern>" 2>&1
```

### 6. Run type-check
```bash
npm run type-check 2>&1
```

### 7. Verify ESLint
```bash
npx eslint --max-warnings=0 <changed-files> 2>&1
```

### 8. Commit (only relevant files — NOT .husky/pre-push)
```bash
git add <specific-files-only>
git commit -m "RECO-690: <description>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>"
```

### 9. Push
```bash
git push -u origin RECO-690-<branch-name>
```

### 10. Create DRAFT PR
Base = `RECO-689-fix-util-require-object-params` (NOT main).

```bash
gh pr create --draft --base RECO-689-fix-util-require-object-params --title "RECO-690: ..." --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
### Ticket 🐗

JIRA task: [RECO-690](https://customink.atlassian.net/browse/RECO-690)
Design: N/A

### Changes 🍍

<describe changes>

### PR Checks 🐊

- [x] I've self-reviewed my code.
- [x] I've added the necessary labels.
- [x] I've added tests for my code.
- [ ] I've updated the documentation.

### Description / Ticket Summary 🐙

Fix ESLint custom-rules/require-object-params violations — refactored functions to use single object destructuring parameter pattern.

### Screenshots / Short Videos 🐮

N/A
EOF
)"
```

## Critical Rules
- NEVER modify `.husky/pre-push`
- NEVER use relative imports (use `@utils/`, `@modules/`, etc.)
- NO comments in code
- All functions need explicit return types
- Do NOT use `{ ...spread }` as shortcut

## Return
1. The new branch name
2. The PR URL
3. Summary of files changed

content.text:
Done. Here's a summary:

**New branch:** `RECO-690-fix-random-color-picker-require-object-params`

**PR URL:** https://github.com/customink/recommendations-service/pull/489

**Files changed:**

1. `/src/utils/random-color-picker.util.ts` — Refactored all 4 exported functions (`assignRandomColorsToProducts`, `assignRandomColorToProduct`, `getRandomColorFromArray`, `mapHitToRelatedProductWithRandomColor`) to use single object destructuring params. Also updated `availableColors` type to `IProductColor[] | undefined` to satisfy TypeScript's `exactOptionalPropertyTypes`.

2. `/src/unit-tests/random-color-picker.util.unit-spec.ts` — Updated all test calls to use new object destructuring syntax.

3. `/src/modules/rest/trending-products/trending-products.service.ts` — Updated 2 calls to `assignRandomColorToProduct`.

4. `/src/modules/rest/promos/promos.service.ts` — Updated 3 calls to `assignRandomColorToProduct`.

5. `/src/modules/rest/email-recommendations/email-recommendations.service.ts` — Updated 1 call.

6. `/src/modules/rest/promotional-products/promotional-products.service.ts` — Updated 2 calls.

7. `/src/modules/rest/addons/addons.service.ts` — Updated 1 call.

8. `/test/rest/email-recommendations.service.e2e-spec.ts` — Updated jest mock to destructure `{ product }` from the object parameter.
